_meta.schema: OPD / Dental rider comparison — see src/lib/allianz/opd.ts
_meta.coverage: Phase E v1 — OPDMFCPN_ALL, OPDMFCPN_BDMS, OPDMFCPD (Platinum-only), DVMFCPN_ALL, DVMFCPN_BDMS. All transcribed from First Class Ultra Apr-2026 brochures.  OPDMDC (ดับเบิล แคร์ OPD) intentionally omitted — brochure not yet published (see KNOWN_BROCHURE_GAPS).  OPDMSK (สบายกระเป๋า OPD) also omitted — SabaiKapao brochure doesn't disclose OPD cell values.
_meta.notes: Cells are pre-formatted Thai strings. 'null' = explicitly 'ไม่คุ้มครอง' in the table. Missing keys = 'not disclosed'. Plan codes BEYOND/PLATINUM match the IPD tier the OPD rider is bundled with — same product code pays different amounts depending on its IPD partner.
